title: Phased, validated, reversible — and we never A/B-test illegality
subtitle: From legal foundation to full rollout with hard gates at each phase.
diagram_alt: Four phases over 14 weeks with go/no-go gates leading to compliant, audit-ready state.

ab.handling: For mandatory elements run 'compliance shadow tests': new notice to 100% of a cohort vs a holdback that sees the OLD compliant notice — never a non-compliant one.

validation: Quant: funnel, cohort retention, VCCR trend
Legal: external DPDP mock audit every 2 weeks
Tech: chaos test Ledger (Kafka outage → fallback queue)
notes: Phase 1 is make-or-break. We test HOW to make compliance delightful, never WHETHER compliance is needed. The non-testable list is our red line.
